name: Google Reviews & Business Data API
description: Extract Google Business reviews, ratings, photos, and business details for any location. Supports review sorting, rating distribution, owner response tracking, and business search.
longDescription: A comprehensive Google Business data API that extracts reviews, ratings, and business details using real mobile proxies. Fetch up to 50 reviews per request with sorting options (newest, relevant, highest, lowest). Get full business info including address, phone, hours, photos, categories, and coordinates. Search businesses by category + location. Track rating distributions, owner response rates, and sentiment breakdown. Covers all Google-listed businesses globally.
